title: bihai crassa
intro: Bihai crassa is a plant species known for its medicinal properties, although it's also referred to as 'Bai He' in some Chinese herbal medicine. Traditionally, the plant is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, sore throat, and inflammation due to its antiviral and antibacterial properties. Bihai crassa is often consumed as a tea or used in herbal preparations to promote health benefits like reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal medicine, the plant is typically dried and made into capsules or infusions for its medicinal use.
